name: MPC Bus Corp
owner_or_parent: Total Transportation Corp (subsidiary of First Student / EQT)
districts_or_customers: Union County NJ Dept. of Human Services paratransit; NEMT
recent_news: Listed as an affiliated location of Total Transportation Corp (Cranford-based bus operator that is part of First Student, EQT-owned). MCS-150 updated 8/2024 showing 52 power units/52 drivers, intrastate-only.
fit_notes: Not a tuck-in target. MPC Bus Corp is listed under Total Transportation Corp's locations, and Total Transportation is part of First Student (EQT-owned) — a direct strategic competitor to Summit. Already consolidated.
